To contact any branch of the Bank you can call
010 31 88 88
There are cash-in terminals in all branches of the Bank.
The terminals installed in the customer service halls of the bank branches operate from Monday-Wednesday from 09:30 to 18:00 and Thursday-Friday from 9:30 to 17:30.
The 24/7 cash terminals are located in the following branches:
